chapter_title.en: The bond that Allah has set amongst the believers

text: 84- عن أبي عبد الله (ع) قال المؤمنون إخوةٌ بنو أبٍ وأُمّ، فإذا ضرب على رجُل منهم عرقٌ سهر الآخَرون.

en.muhajir-b-ali: 84. It has been reported that Abu 'Abd Allah (a.s) said:Believers are like brothers from one father and mother; when one of them is struck, the others lose sleep.
